js: (function(){ const fakeSave = JSON.stringify({version:1, savedAt: new Date().toISOString(), currentScreen:'combat', runState:{isActive:true,floor:2,playerHp:80,playerMaxHp:100,currency:50,consumedRewardFactIds:['f1'],factsAnsweredCorrectly:['f2'],factsAnsweredIncorrectly:[],firstChargeFreeFactIds:[],offeredRelicIds:[],cursedFactIds:[],attemptedFactIds:[],runRelics:[],floorHistory:[],runCards:[],ascensionLevel:0,ascensionModifiers:{enemyDamageMultiplier:1,healingMultiplier:1,shopPriceMultiplier:1,startingGold:50,startingHp:100,relicChoicesReduced:false,eliteModifier:false,removeCurseOption:false,wrongAnswerSelfDamage:0,comboResetsOnTurnEnd:false},globalTurnCounter:3,soulJarCharges:0,factVariantLevel:{},retreatRewardLocked:false,startingAp:3,primaryDomainRunNumber:1,earlyBoostActive:false,starterDeckSize:5,currentSegment:1,encountersTotal:3,encountersWon:1,factsAnswered:5,factsCorrect:3,correctAnswers:3,bestCombo:2,newFactsLearned:3,factsMastered:0,cardsEarned:0,primaryDomain:'general_knowledge',selectedArchetype:'balanced'}}); localStorage.setItem('recall-rogue-active-run', fakeSave); return JSON.stringify({step1: 'VALID_SAVE_SET', len: fakeSave.length}); })()

(function(){ const raw = localStorage.getItem('recall-rogue-active-run'); if (!raw) return JSON.stringify({test:'corrupt_byte_test',result:'SKIP',reason:'no save'}); const arr = Array.from(raw); const midIdx = Math.floor(arr.length / 2); arr[midIdx] = 'X'; arr[midIdx+1] = 'X'; const corrupted = arr.join(''); localStorage.setItem('recall-rogue-active-run', corrupted); let parseResult; try { JSON.parse(corrupted); parseResult = 'still_valid_json'; } catch(e) { parseResult = 'parse_throws_as_expected'; } return JSON.stringify({step2: 'corrupt_applied', midIdx: midIdx, parseResult: parseResult, isParseError: parseResult === 'parse_throws_as_expected'}); })()

(function(){ try { const raw = localStorage.getItem('recall-rogue-active-run'); if (!raw) return JSON.stringify({step3:'graceful',result:'null_returned_no_save'}); const parsed = JSON.parse(raw); if (!parsed || typeof parsed.version !== 'number') return JSON.stringify({step3:'graceful',result:'null_returned_invalid_version'}); return JSON.stringify({step3:'graceful',result:'valid_despite_corruption',warn:'save may not have been corrupted'}); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({step3:'graceful',result:'parse_threw_caught',msg:e.message.slice(0,80),note:'loadActiveRun() catches this and returns null - correct'}); } })()

(function(){ localStorage.removeItem('recall-rogue-active-run'); localStorage.setItem('recall-rogue-active-run', 'not-valid-json-at-all{}'); try { JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('recall-rogue-active-run')); return JSON.stringify({step4:'invalid_json_test',result:'UNEXPECTED_PARSE_SUCCESS'}); } catch(e) { return JSON.stringify({step4:'invalid_json_test',result:'PASS - parse_throws_as_expected',graceful: 'loadActiveRun() would return null here'}); } })()

(function(){ localStorage.removeItem('recall-rogue-active-run'); localStorage.setItem('recall-rogue-active-run', JSON.stringify({version: 99999, runState:{isActive:true,playerHp:70,floor:1}})); const p = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('recall-rogue-active-run')); const versionCheck = typeof p.version === 'number' ? 'ACCEPTED' : 'REJECTED'; return JSON.stringify({step5:'future_version_test',version:p.version,versionCheck:versionCheck,note:'loadActiveRun checks typeof version=number only, any number version is accepted without migration guard - potential future compat issue'}); })()
